Description:
Hi, Im Kamael, an illustrator based in Singapore. Currently, I work as a full-time freelance illustrator.
Abstract art style characterizes my work, but with a unique and different touch from other abstract styles. my abstract artworks, art lines and dark art with character combine in stunning harmony.
